features.name: Task analyzer: Claude decomposes natural language task into { repoId, featureDescription, testStrategy, deployTarget } JSON
Repo resolver: fuzzy-match task description against repo-queue.json tags/name/focus fields to find best target repo
Subtask splitter: detect complex tasks and split into ordered subtask list, execute sequentially
Task dispatch: call harness/task-agent.js programmatically with resolved repo + feature description via child_process
Execution monitor: stream task-agent stdout/stderr to engineering_agent.jsonl log in real time
Retry logic: if task-agent tests fail, rephrase task with more context and retry once before reporting failure
Test runner: after task-agent completes, independently run npm test / pytest and parse pass/fail count
Code review gate: Claude reviews git diff HEAD~1 and scores quality 1-10; reject and report if score < 6
Regression check: verify passing test count did not decrease from pre-task baseline snapshot
Vercel deploy trigger: POST to Vercel deploy webhook URL from env after tests pass and review gate clears
GitHub push: git push origin main after successful tests + code review gate
Deploy status poll: poll Vercel deployments API every 10s until status READY or ERROR (max 5min)
Result schema: { success, repoId, task, filesChanged, testsPass, deployUrl, commitHash, duration, reviewScore }
Engineering log: append each task result to logs/engineering-agent.jsonl with full result schema
Failure report: on failure write root cause + relevant log excerpt to result for orchestrator reflector consumption
